## Situation

What appears missing, corrupted, or unrecoverable?

## Stop Before Sharing Private Content

Do not paste JSON backups, Markdown exports, localStorage values, or screenshots
of private records unless you intentionally want to share world content.

Start with Data > Diagnostics instead.

## Current State

- Does the app still open: yes/no
- Can Data > JSON export download or copy text: yes/no
- Are recovery snapshots visible on Data: yes/no
- Did this happen after import, reset, browser cleanup, profile switch, private
  browsing, device change, or deployment update:

## Diagnostics

Attach or paste Data > Diagnostics if available.

## Last Known Good Backup

- Do you have a downloaded JSON backup: yes/no
- Approximate backup date:

## Browser And App

- Browser:
- Installed as PWA: yes/no
- App version:
- Route where the issue was first noticed:
